title: Enphase Energy Q4 2022 Earnings Preview: Expected 70%+ Y/Y Growth
text: Enphase Energy Q4 2022 earnings preview for February 7 announcement showed consensus EPS estimate of $1.26 (+72.6% Y/Y) and consensus revenue estimate of $703.16M (+70.4% Y/Y). This Q4 2022 earnings preview indicated strong year-over-year growth expectations for both earnings per share and revenue.
